content: schwab-py StreamClient services: LEVELONE_EQUITY, LEVELONE_OPTION, LEVELONE_FUTURES, LEVELONE_FUTURES_OPTIONS, LEVELONE_FOREX, CHART_EQUITY, CHART_FUTURES, NYSE_BOOK, NASDAQ_BOOK, OPTIONS_BOOK, SCREENER_EQUITY, SCREENER_OPTION, ACCT_ACTIVITY. LevelOneOptionFields enum (from streaming.py source): SYMBOL=0, DESCRIPTION=1, BID_PRICE=2, ASK_PRICE=3, LAST_PRICE=4, HIGH_PRICE=5, LOW_PRICE=6, CLOSE_PRICE=7, TOTAL_VOLUME=8, OPEN_INTEREST=9, VOLATILITY=10 (this is implied volatility), MONEY_INTRINSIC_VALUE=11, EXPIRATION_YEAR=12, MULTIPLIER=13, DIGITS=14, OPEN_PRICE=15, BID_SIZE=16, ASK_SIZE=17, LAST_SIZE=18, NET_CHANGE=19, STRIKE_TYPE=20, CONTRACT_TYPE=21, UNDERLYING=22, EXPIRATION_MONTH=23, DELIVERABLES=24, TIME_VALUE=25, EXPIRATION_DAY=26, DAYS_TO_EXPIRATION=27, DELTA=28, GAMMA=29, THETA=30, VEGA=31, RHO=32, SECURITY_STATUS=33, THEORETICAL_OPTION_VALUE=34, UNDERLYING_PRICE=35, UV_EXPIRATION_TYPE=36, MARK=37, QUOTE_TIME_MILLIS=38, TRADE_TIME_MILLIS=39, EXCHANGE_ID=40, EXCHANGE_NAME=41, LAST_TRADING_DAY=42, SETTLEMENT_TYPE=43, NET_PERCENT_CHANGE=44. AccountActivityFields: SUBSCRIPTION_KEY, ACCOUNT, MESSAGE_TYPE, MESSAGE_DATA. Symbol cap: schwab-client-js docs say 'up to 500 symbols at one time' for streaming -- this is a hard session cap. SPX full chain has 2000-5000 contracts across expirations; full-chain streaming is IMPOSSIBLE within the 500-symbol cap. Recommendation: stream only the 10-20 legs in current positions. One streamer session per account enforced: code 12 CLOSE_CONNECTION if second session opened.
